news.paragraph: Gold is edging higher following a surge in U.S. wholesale inflation, even as a rising dollar exerts pressure. However, a strategist from a major fund has warned that gold may not be an effective hedge against inflation. Traders should consider these conflicting views on gold's inflationary protection when evaluating current price action.
